temporal_description:
(00:00-00:01) A close-up shot shows a person's hand, covered in blood and white, chalky residue, being forcefully slammed down onto a table littered with broken pieces of a white object, possibly a cup or vase. The action is sudden and violent. (Storyline: This opening shot immediately establishes a scene of violence and distress, creating immediate tension and mystery about what has just occurred.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A loud, impactful thud as the hand hits the table, followed by a faint, tense musical score.)
(00:02-00:07) A man with a distressed and pained expression looks off-screen. He is wearing a black shirt and a necklace. He stumbles backward, coughing and gasping for air, appearing to be in physical distress or shock. (Storyline: The character's physical and emotional state is revealed, suggesting he is a victim or is reacting to a traumatic event. His struggle to breathe implies he is in pain.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The man's heavy coughing and gasping sounds are prominent. A low, ominous musical score plays in the background.)
